waves.point_eqs_str: a['center_x']=a['q1']; a['center_y']=a['q2']; a['radius']=a['q3']; a['tx']=div(Math.floor(randint(1001)),1000); a['ty']=div(Math.floor(randint(1001)),1000); a['d_x']=div((div((a['tx']-a['center_x']),a['radius'])*4),3); a['d_y']=div((a['ty']-a['center_y']),a['radius']); a['rad']=above(((a['d_x']*a['d_x'])+(a['d_y']*a['d_y'])), 1.3); a['a']=a['rad']; a['x']=a['tx']; a['y']=(1-a['ty']); a['r']=a['x']; a['g']=a['y']; a['b']=div((a['x']+a['y']),2);

frame_eqs_str: a['dx']=0; a['dy']=0; a['mtime']=(a['mtime']+(a['bass']*a['bass'])); a['mtime2']=(a['mtime2']+(a['treb']*a['treb'])); a['radius']=(0.2+(0.05*Math.sin((a['mtime']*0.1)))); a['b_right']=(above(a['xpos'], (1-a['radius']))*above(sign(a['ddx']), 0)); a['b_left']=(below(a['xpos'], a['radius'])*below(sign(a['ddx']), 0)); a['b_bottom']=(above(a['ypos'], (1-a['radius']))*above(sign(a['ddy']), 0)); a['b_top']=(below(a['ypos'], a['radius'])*below(sign(a['ddy']), 0)); a['ddx']=(a['ddx']*((Math.abs(a['b_right'])>0.00001)?(-1):(1))); a['ddx']=(a['ddx']*((Math.abs(a['b_left'])>0.00001)?(-1):(1))); a['ddy']=(a['ddy']*((Math.abs(a['b_bottom'])>0.00001)?(-1):(1))); a['ddy']=(a['ddy']*((Math.abs(a['b_top'])>0.00001)?(-1):(1))); a['xpos']=(a['xpos']+a['ddx']); a['ypos']=(a['ypos']+a['ddy']); a['angle']=Math.atan2(a['ddy'], div((a['ddx']*4),3)); a['angle']=(Math.sin((a['mtime2']*0.1))*6.28); a['q1']=a['xpos']; a['q2']=a['ypos']; a['q3']=a['radius']; a['q4']=a['angle']; a['monitor']=a['angle'];
